title: BEM-542.5 final report
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem542')
reports = Path('governance/reports')
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
role_state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
contour_status_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
provider_state_path = Path('governance/state/provider_contour_state.json')
pending = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM542_REAL_INTERNAL_ORCHESTRATOR_TEST_ROADMAP.md')
done = Path('governance/tasks/done/BEM542_REAL_INTERNAL_ORCHESTRATOR_TEST_ROADMAP.md')
done.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
cycle = 'bem542-practical-e2e'

# collect transport records
records = []
if transport.exists():
    for line in transport.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines():
        if not line.strip():
            continue
        try:
            r = json.loads(line)
        except Exception:
            continue
        if r.get('cycle_id') in ['bem542-real-orchestrator-test', 'bem542-practical-e2e']:
            records.append(r)

practical_decisions = [r for r in records if r.get('cycle_id') == cycle and r.get('record_type') == 'role_orchestrator_decision']
provider_decisions = [r for r in records if r.get('record_type') == 'provider_selection_decision']
final_results = [r for r in records if r.get('cycle_id') == cycle and r.get('record_type') == 'final_result']

expected = ['analyst','auditor','executor','auditor_final','curator_closure']
actual = [r.get('to_role') for r in practical_decisions]
practical_ok = actual == expected and len(final_results) > 0
provider_ok = any(r.get('provider_probe_signal') == 'active' and r.get('selected_provider') == 'claude' for r in provider_decisions) and any(r.get('provider_probe_signal') == 'failed' and r.get('selected_provider') == 'gpt' for r in provider_decisions)

status = 'PASS' if practical_ok and provider_ok else 'BLOCKER'
blocker = None if status == 'PASS' else {'code':'BEM542_FINAL_VALIDATION_FAILED','actual_sequence':actual,'provider_decisions_count':len(provider_decisions),'final_results_count':len(final_results)}

role_state = json.loads(role_state_path.read_text()) if role_state_path.exists() else {}
role_state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:17 (UTC+3)'
role_state['cycle_id'] = cycle
role_state['curator_status'] = 'CLOSED' if status == 'PASS' else 'BLOCKED'
role_state['active_role'] = 'curator'
role_state['next_role'] = None
role_state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-542','title':'Real internal orchestrator practical test','status':'completed' if status == 'PASS' else 'blocked'}
role_state['blocker'] = blocker
hist = role_state.get('history', [])
if not isinstance(hist, list): hist = [hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 14:17 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-542 final report','status':status,'actual_sequence':actual})
role_state['history'] = hist
role_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(role_state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

contour = json.loads(contour_status_path.read_text()) if contour_status_path.exists() else {}
contour['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:17 (UTC+3)'
contour['last_real_orchestrator_test'] = {
  'id':'BEM-542',
  'status':status,
  'task1_sha':'336d136a1b20c9d7483beb9727231a762f0f45c6',
  'task2_sha':'58428e01057c57eda7833358c79c5a7003f59c20',
  'task3_sha':'4bca6604959bd6055ec6668007834d78c54b249a',
  'task4_sha':'dfa3e9add81b1712ad290f3913d0e6379be984c6',
  'task5_sha':'this_commit',
  'orchestrator_sequence':actual,
  'provider_probe_before_reserve':provider_ok,
  'boundary':'practical file-transport orchestrator logic via codex-runner; not independent always-on agents'
}
contour['last_result'] = 'BEM-542 real orchestrator practical test ' + status
contour['blocker'] = blocker
contour_status_path.write_text(json.dumps(contour, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

pending_text = pending.read_text(errors='ignore') if pending.exists() else '# BEM-542 Real Internal Orchestrator Test Roadmap\n'
done.write_text(pending_text + '\n\n---\n\n## Result\nBEM-542 ' + status + '. Practical orchestrator decision model verified.\n\nEvidence:\n- BEM-542.1 preflight: 336d136a1b20c9d7483beb9727231a762f0f45c6\n- BEM-542.2 orchestrator decision harness: 58428e01057c57eda7833358c79c5a7003f59c20\n- BEM-542.3 provider probe: 4bca6604959bd6055ec6668007834d78c54b249a\n- BEM-542.4 practical orchestrator E2E: dfa3e9add81b1712ad290f3913d0e6379be984c6\n- BEM-542.5 final report: final commit\n\nBoundary: tested practical orchestrator logic through file transport and codex-runner execution, not independent always-on live agents.\n\nBlocker: ' + ('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False)) + '\n')
if pending.exists():
    pending.unlink()
    changed_files.append(str(pending))

report = reports/'bem542_real_internal_orchestrator_test_report.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-542 | Real Internal Orchestrator Practical Test | ' + status + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:17 (UTC+3)\n\n## 1. Что было исправлено после замечания оператора\n\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| Ошибка BEM-540 | BEM-540 был synthetic: роли были заранее записаны одним executor script | Оператор указал, что это не реальная модель работы системы |\n| Исправление BEM-542 | Оркестратор теперь читает latest transport record и сам выбирает следующую роль | `role_orchestrator_decision` records в exchange file |\n| Provider issue | Reserve GPT не выбирается без probe | BEM-542.3: Claude active -> Claude selected; Claude failed -> GPT reserve |\n\n## 2. Roadmap BEM-542\n\n| Этап | Статус | SHA | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| BEM-542.1 Preflight | PASS | `336d136a1b20c9d7483beb9727231a762f0f45c6` | Проверены gap и roadmap |\n| BEM-542.2 Orchestrator decision harness | PASS | `58428e01057c57eda7833358c79c5a7003f59c20` | Оркестратор вывел `analyst` из `task_type=development` |\n| BEM-542.3 Provider probe | PASS | `4bca6604959bd6055ec6668007834d78c54b249a` | Claude active -> Claude; Claude failed -> GPT reserve |\n| BEM-542.4 Practical E2E | PASS | `dfa3e9add81b1712ad290f3913d0e6379be984c6` | Оркестратор сам выбрал последовательность ролей |\n| BEM-542.5 Final report | ' + status + ' | this commit | Итоговая проверка |\n\n## 3. Как работал оркестратор\n\n| Шаг | input record | decision | reason | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|---|---|\n' + ''.join(['| ' + str(i+1) + ' | ' + str(practical_decisions[i].get('input_record_type')) + ' | ' + str(practical_decisions[i].get('to_role')) + ' | ' + str(practical_decisions[i].get('reason')) + ' | role_orchestrator_decision |\n' for i in range(len(practical_decisions))]) + '\n## 4. Provider probe\n\n| Probe | Selected provider | Reserve used | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|---|\n' + ''.join(['| ' + str(r.get('provider_probe_signal')) + ' | ' + str(r.get('selected_provider')) + ' | ' + str(r.get('reserve_used')) + ' | ' + str(r.get('reason')) + ' |\n' for r in provider_decisions]) + '\n## 5. Честная граница теста\n\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| Что доказано | Практическая orchestration logic работает: next_role выводится из exchange file, а не задаётся вручную | Sequence: ' + ' -> '.join(actual) + ' |\n| Что не является доказанным | Независимые always-on агенты/отдельный live runner сами не просыпаются без execution channel | Тест выполнен через codex-runner как разрешённый executor |\n| Архитектура | External GPT не dispatch internal workflows напрямую | Вход через curator intake сохранён |\n| Следующая доработка | Встроить эту decision logic в постоянный curator/orchestrator runtime, если нужен fully live daemon-like режим | Сейчас это practical workflow execution, не daemon |\n\n## 6. Blocker\n' + ('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False)) + '\n')

proof = proofs/'bem542_final_system_report.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-542 final ' + status + ': orchestrator_sequence=' + '->'.join(actual) + ', provider_probe_ok=' + str(provider_ok) + '\n')
changed_files.extend([str(role_state_path), str(contour_status_path), str(done), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-542.5 final report and closure completed')
"""
No issue comments.
